requirements.summary: Implement 3D game environment with controllable player movement using WASD and mouse controls
acceptanceCriteria: Player can move in all directions using WASD keys
Mouse controls camera rotation for looking around
Movement is smooth and responsive

file_operations.description: Create main 3D game component using React Three Fiber. Set up Canvas with camera configuration for first-person perspective. This is a 3D game component that will contain all game logic and rendering.

Create custom hook for player movement controls. Implement WASD keyboard input handling for forward/backward/strafe movement. Add mouse input handling for camera rotation (look around). Ensure smooth and responsive movement with proper velocity and acceleration.
Create Player component representing the first-person camera and controller. Use usePlayerControls hook to handle movement and rotation. Implement physics-based movement with collision detection.

requirements.summary: Add shooting mechanics with muzzle flash, projectile trajectories, and hit detection
acceptanceCriteria: Left mouse click fires weapon
Visible projectile or raycast effect when shooting
Muzzle flash animation appears on firing
Hits are detected on target objects

file_operations.description: Create custom hook for weapon mechanics. Implement left mouse click handler to fire weapon. Add raycasting for hit detection against target objects. Track ammunition count and prevent firing when empty. Include logic to display muzzle flash effect using the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/muzzle-flash.dim_256x256.png.

Create MuzzleFlash component for visual feedback when firing. Use sprite or plane with the generated muzzle flash image at frontend/public/assets/generated/muzzle-flash.dim_256x256.png. Implement animation that shows flash briefly then fades out.
Create Projectile component for visible bullet trajectory. Implement movement along firing direction with physics. Handle collision detection and trigger hit effects on contact with targets.
Integrate useWeapon hook into Player component. Wire shooting mechanics to player's camera perspective. Position MuzzleFlash component relative to camera when firing.

requirements.summary: Create 3D arena with obstacles, cover positions, and collision detection for tactical gameplay
acceptanceCriteria: Arena contains walls, obstacles, and cover objects
Player collision prevents walking through solid objects
Environment provides tactical positioning opportunities

file_operations.description: Create Arena component containing the 3D game environment. Build walls, floor, and ceiling using React Three Fiber boxes/meshes. Add various obstacles and cover objects (boxes, barriers) positioned strategically for tactical gameplay. Apply timeless aesthetic with muted colors and atmospheric materials. Use the generated skybox texture at frontend/public/assets/generated/skybox.dim_2048x2048.png for the environment background.
Create custom hook for collision detection. Implement bounding box or sphere collision checks between player and arena geometry. Return collision state to prevent movement through solid objects.
Integrate useCollision hook to prevent player from passing through walls and obstacles. Adjust movement logic to respect collision boundaries.
Add Arena component to the game scene. Position and configure lighting for atmospheric effect that supports the timeless aesthetic.

requirements.summary: Implement destructible enemy targets with hit feedback and destruction states
acceptanceCriteria: Enemy targets are visible in the arena
Targets react visually when hit
Targets are removed or show destroyed state after sufficient damage

file_operations.description: Create Enemy component representing a destructible target. Implement health tracking and visual feedback for hits (color change, animation). Handle destruction state when health reaches zero with removal or destroyed visual. Apply timeless aesthetic styling consistent with arena design.
Create custom hook to manage enemy state array. Handle spawning enemies at defined positions. Provide methods to damage and remove enemies. Track defeated enemies count for score calculation.
Integrate enemy placement within the arena. Position enemies at strategic locations that create engaging gameplay.
Wire useEnemies hook into game state. Connect weapon hit detection to enemy damage system. Update backend when enemies are defeated via defeatEnemy method.

requirements.summary: Add game state management for health, ammunition, score, and enemy defeats with backend persistence
acceptanceCriteria: Player health is tracked and displayed
Ammunition count decreases with each shot
Score increases when enemies are defeated
Game state persists across sessions via backend

file_operations.description: Create custom hook for comprehensive game state management. Track player health, ammunition count, score, and enemies defeated locally. Integrate with backend interface methods (getGameState, startGame, increaseScore, defeatEnemy, takeDamage, rechargeWeapon) to persist state. Load initial state from backend on game start. Sync local state changes to backend appropriately.

Integrate useGameState hook into main game component. Pass game state values to child components (Player, HUD, etc.). Wire game events (taking damage, shooting, defeating enemies) to state update methods. Initialize game state by calling startGame backend method with player ID.
Connect weapon firing to ammunition state. Decrement ammo count on each shot. Prevent firing when ammunition is zero.

requirements.summary: Display HUD with crosshair, health bar, ammunition counter, and score
acceptanceCriteria: Crosshair appears at screen center
Health bar shows current player health
Ammo counter displays remaining ammunition
Score is visible and updates in real-time

file_operations.description: Create HUD component for displaying game information overlay. Position crosshair at screen center using the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/crosshair.dim_64x64.png. Display health bar showing current/max health. Show ammunition counter with current ammo count. Display score prominently. Apply timeless aesthetic styling with semi-transparent overlays and muted colors consistent with game theme.
Create HealthBar component as a visual progress bar. Accept current and max health as props. Style with muted colors fitting the timeless aesthetic.
Add HUD component to game with absolute positioning over the 3D canvas. Pass game state values (health, ammo, score) from useGameState hook to HUD component.

requirements.summary: Apply timeless ethereal aesthetic with muted colors, atmospheric lighting, and suspended time ambiance
acceptanceCriteria: Visual style uses desaturated or muted color palette
Lighting creates atmospheric, dreamlike ambiance
Overall aesthetic feels timeless rather than contemporary
Consistent art direction applied to all 3D assets and UI elements

file_operations.description: Create dedicated stylesheet for game visual theme. Define CSS custom properties for muted color palette (pale blues, grays, desaturated tones). Set font styles for HUD that feel timeless and ethereal. Apply semi-transparent overlays and subtle glows.

Apply muted material colors to all arena geometry (walls, floor, obstacles). Use desaturated textures and colors. Integrate the skybox texture at frontend/public/assets/generated/skybox.dim_2048x2048.png for atmospheric background.

Configure scene lighting for atmospheric effect. Use ambient light with low intensity and fog effect to create dreamlike ambiance. Add subtle directional or point lights with muted colors (pale gold, soft blue) to enhance suspended-time feeling.
Style enemy targets with muted, desaturated materials consistent with timeless aesthetic. Use subtle emissive properties for ethereal glow effect.
Import and apply game-theme.css styles to HUD elements. Ensure all UI components use the defined muted color palette and ethereal styling.
